candidates.why: Explicit top-line revenue label and preferred candidate; matches total sales/revenue concept.
Also a top-line revenue label in the statement, but not needed because Total Revenue is present as the clearer total revenue line.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total revenue line.

candidates.why: Direct match to COGS/cost of sales concept and preferred over component raw materials rows.
Also matches the concept, but may be an alternate label/duplicate rather than the primary line.
Production cost component, but less complete than an explicit COGS line.

variables.notes: Preferred the explicit COGS label over component/input-cost rows.

candidates.why: Explicit SG&A row exists, which should be selected for XSGA when present.
Overhead component and useful for coverage when the explicit SG&A row appears mostly empty in the preview.
Closest broad overhead bucket available; appropriate to include with an mostly-empty SG&A row per hierarchy rule.
Dedicated R&D line exists, but it appears below Operating profit, so it should not be included in XSGA under the ordering rule.

variables.notes: Applied SG&A hierarchy rule (b): the explicit SG&A row exists but appears mostly empty in the preview, so included it plus the closest overhead buckets for broader year coverage. Excluded depreciation/amortization lines and excluded Research & Development from XSGA because the R&D line appears below Operating profit.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line; suitable for XRD even though it appears below Operating profit.

variables.notes: Mapped to the dedicated R&D line. It appears below Operating profit, so it is not also included in XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Best core recurring interest expense line; preferred over total financial expenses.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring financing cost component that should be included with other interest expense components.
Likely recurring finance-cost component; acceptable to include when using granular finance-cost rows.
Total finance expense line, but less preferred because granular recurring components are available.
Excluded because derivatives/fair-value-related finance items are not preferred recurring interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Used granular recurring finance-cost components and avoided the broader Financial expenses total to reduce double counting. Excluded derivatives-related interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Total equity owners of the Parent
candidates.why: Best match for book equity excluding non-controlling interests, which is preferred for BE.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity owners of the Parent

variables.notes: Preferred parent-owners equity so BE excludes non-controlling interests.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet NCI line; preferred for minority interest mapping.
Equivalent concept and possible alternate label across years.

variables.notes: Provided both balance-sheet NCI labels as a priority list to capture possible label variation across years.
